issue_summary: Make ForwardingListenableFuture javadoc consistent Add SimpleForwading*Future
javadoc_before: /** * A {@link Future} which forwards all its method calls to another future. * Subclasses should override one or more methods to modify the behavior of * the backing collection as desired per the decorator pattern. * * @author Sven Mawson * @since 1 */
javadoc_after:
/** * A {@link Future} which forwards all its method calls to another future. * Subclasses should override one or more methods to modify the behavior of * the backing future as desired per the decorator pattern. * *

Most subclasses can just use {@link SimpleForwardingFuture}. * * @author Sven Mawson * @since 1 */
